name: Glazed Fresh Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Food Coloring; A Few Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash 1 pint of the strawberries using a fork and set aside.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water and mashed berries.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in food coloring. Allow to cool to room temperature.
5. Fold in the remaining 1 pint of strawberries and turn into the baked pie shell.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
7. Top with puffs of sweetened whipped cream before serving.
